violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Observed seal on the walk in cooler damaged at time of inspection.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Observed single use items being stored on the floor in the shed at time of inpection. Examples would be cups, lids, containers adn clamshells.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Observed a standing fan in front of the handsink at the time of inspection

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Observed loose hanging debris from ceiling in the kitchen area

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil * was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Hot Dog tongs by the hot dog roller were stored in standing room temp. Ice Scoops were stored directly on top on machine.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less Products in prep cooler temp between 53-56 degrees. unit not maintaining temp under 41 degrees. recommended moving tcf food to another cooler for time and temperature safety

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. Tested sanitizer in 3 comp sink, it did not show any sanitizer. Employee stated he mixed water from faucet with sanitizer from dispenser diluting sanitizer. Gave TA and employee corrected problem.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use cups were observed on floor in storage room. Pizza boxes need inverted on shelves in back room
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. Restroom does not have a self closing door.
